summary.intent: Implement issue #277 (Marquee agnostic core) in the ars-ui Rust UI component library, following TDD practices and repo conventions for state machine components.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented the Marquee core component with state machine, events, parts, ARIA/CSS attributes, localization, and comprehensive tests (unit, spec-conformance, proptest). Committed after passing the cargo xci pre-push gate (8018 unit tests, 91%+ line coverage). Push and PR creation were not completed in the session.

repo: Components follow a consistent pattern: NoEffect, Service-driven inline tests, ComponentPart data attributes, and insta snapshots.

cargo xci --profile fast is the mandatory pre-push gate with 10 steps: fmt, clippy, nextest, i18n slices, integration, adapter checks, spec snippet compilation, error coverage, mutual exclusion, snapshot-count, native coverage.
Proptests are marked #[ignore] by convention for nightly-only runs.
The snapshot-reviewed label must be applied to PRs that add snapshots.
The .agents/skills/waiting-for-codex-review/SKILL.md skill must be invoked after every push until Codex approves.
Moving GitHub Project v2 items requires resolving project/field/option IDs via the gh CLI before mutation.
cargo insta test --unreferenced=reject cannot be used project-wide because many pre-existing unreferenced snapshots exist in unrelated components; --unreferenced=warn is the safe fallback.
insta auto-stages accepted snapshot files; during no-commit-until-review phases these must be manually unstaged with git restore --staged.

code.finding: Implements State::{Playing,Paused}, Event::{Play,Pause,HoverIn,HoverOut,FocusIn,FocusOut,LoopComplete}, Direction, EdgeSide, Props, Context, Messages, Machine, Api, and Part::{Root,Content,EdgeSide variant,AutoPlayTrigger} using ars_core primitives.

Spec had multiple omissions backported from implementation: missing type Effect = NoEffect, stale Bindable import, missing Eq on Event, missing Copy/Default/Eq/Hash on Direction and EdgeSide, and loop completion example needed saturating_add for overflow safety.
Proptest module for Marquee added here, marked #[ignore] per repo nightly convention.
Spec-conformance anatomy coverage for Marquee added to this existing file.

workflow: TDD flow: write failing tests first, implement to pass, audit for spec drift, fix formatting, rerun gate.
Post-implementation audit is necessary — extra non-spec event-dispatch helpers and extra data attributes can creep in and must be removed before commit.
cargo fmt --all --check should be run before cargo xci to catch formatting issues early; xci will catch them anyway but fixing first saves a full gate run.
When accepting insta snapshots mid-session without committing, use git restore --staged on snapshot files to keep the working tree clean for review.

friction: cargo insta test --unreferenced=reject fails repo-wide due to many pre-existing unreferenced snapshots in unrelated components, forcing use of --unreferenced=warn instead.
insta auto-stages snapshot files after acceptance, requiring manual git restore --staged to unstage them during a no-commit-until-review phase.
GitHub Project v2 item moves require multi-step ID resolution via gh CLI before the actual mutation, adding friction to issue tracking updates.

The spec at spec/components/data-display/marquee.md had multiple correctness issues (missing derives, stale imports, missing type alias, unsafe arithmetic) that had to be discovered during implementation and backported.
open_items: Push the commit to remote and create the pull request (not completed in session).
Apply the snapshot-reviewed label to the PR once created.
Invoke the .agents/skills/waiting-for-codex-review/SKILL.md skill after pushing to initiate Codex review loop.
Pre-existing unreferenced snapshots in other components should be cleaned up at some point to allow --unreferenced=reject to be used safely repo-wide.
